title: RaveDAO (RAVE) Plunges 40% Despite Top 35 Market Cap Ranking - What's Behind the Crash?
excerpt: RaveDAO token has suffered a devastating 39.95% decline in 24 hours, dropping to $11.71 despite maintaining its position as the 35th largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization. The dramatic selloff has caught investors off guard as the DAO token faces mounting pressure amid broader market uncertainty.
